articles.title: Glamorgan's Welsh youngsters hit statement tons to down Sussex
articles.description: Jack Hope-Bell and Alex Horton add 240 for sixth wicket in comeback win

articles.title: Welsh Fire's late collapse hands points to Southern Brave
articles.description: New captain Sophie Molineux closes game out as Fire lose five wickets for six runs in 13 balls

articles.title: Cox, de Swardt dig deep as Leicestershire edge to two-wicket win
articles.description: Thriller at Kibworth as Gloucestershire's low total nearly proves enough

articles.title: New county report warns of looming 'realities' as financial gulfs widen
articles.description: Leonard Curtis report shows that Hundred equity sale has strengthened the hold of strongest clubs

articles.title: Iyer: Need to 'adapt as soon as possible' after getting a 'reality check'
articles.description: The India T20I captain said a lot of positives came out of the series losses against Ireland and England

articles.title: Zimbabwe look to expose vulnerable India searching for winning formula
articles.description: India are yet to win a T20I under their new captain Shreyas Iyer

articles.title: Raichandani, Venkata leave India on verge of victory
articles.description: Sri Lanka Under-19 finished the day needing 317 runs to win with six wickets in hand

articles.title: Kusal Mendis out of LPL 2026 with hamstring injury
articles.description: The injury is a blow for both Colombo Kaps, as well as the Sri Lanka national team who are set to play India in a two-Test home series starting August 15

articles.title: Kuldeep signs with Yorkshire for County Championship and One-Day Cup
articles.description: His two-part stint will see him feature in eight games on either side of India's Test tour to Sri Lanka

articles.title: Root back in top ten of ODI batting rankings; Rohit closes in on top three
articles.description: Shubman Gill and Virat Kohli remain second and third, behind No. 1 Daryl Mitchell

articles.title: 'Results in England brought the team closer to each other' - Shreyas Iyer hopes to end winless run during ZIM vs IND T20Is
articles.description: "We had a rough patch in England, but there were a lot of positives out of that," Shreyas Iyer opined.

articles.title: 'This could be a very important series for him' - Aakash Chopra on Ravi Bishnoi ahead of ZIM vs IND 2026 T20Is
articles.description: Aakash Chopra believes that the three-match T20I series between India and Zimbabwe will give Ravi Bishnoi a chance to redeem himself after his forgettable outing in the 2nd T20I against England.

articles.title: Kusal Mendis sustains hamstring injury, gets ruled out of LPL 2026
articles.description: Kusal Mendis has been ruled out of the ongoing Lanka Premier League (LPL) 2026. This puts his participation in Sri Lanka's upcoming Test series against India in a cloud of uncertainty.

articles.title: “Not a single player selected from two-time champions RCB” - Sadagoppan Ramesh slams selection hypocrisy ahead of ZIM vs IND 2026 T20Is
articles.description: Sadagoppan Ramesh claimed that while IPL performances become a criterion for selection to India's T20I team for some players, others fail to earn call-ups despite doing well in the cash-rich league.

articles.title: Rahmat Shah announced as Afghanistan's new Test and ODI captain after Hashmatullah Shahidi's resignation
articles.description: Rahmat Shah has been promoted to the captain's role in Afghanistan's Test and ODI setup, replacing Hashmatullah Shahidi.

articles.title: PCB makes padel a mandatory part of training at National Cricket Academy
articles.description: The move is intended to enhance agility, reflexes, stamina, and fielding skills while also making training sessions more engaging.

articles.title: ‘If we had played them…’ - Mohammad Ashraful points to lack of practice matches after Bangladesh's disappointing Zimbabwe tour
articles.description: Bangladesh endured a disappointing start to the tour, losing the one-off Test and the three-match ODI series.

articles.title: Zimbabwe vs India Prediction, 1st T20I – Who will win today’s match between ZIM vs IND?
articles.description: On Thursday, July 23, Zimbabwe (ZIM) lock horns with India (IND) in the first T20I in the three-match series. This clash is going to be held at the Harare Sports Club in Harare.

articles.title: Kuldeep Yadav joins Yorkshire for One Day Cup and County Championship games
articles.description: With Kuldeep already in the country, it makes it easier for the India international to join the Yorkshire squad and compete against Glamorgan in Wales.

articles.title: Ajinkya Rahane signs for a commentary stint at The Hundred
articles.description: Legendary Indian cricketer Ajinkya Rahane is set for a commentary stint during The Hundred.
